description: Style NoteCrafted from the softest fabric and styled with high fashion oomph, this brassiere from bw!tch contours your every curve and shapes you to give you an effortlessly curvy look in your body-hugging outfits. Now that's something worth investing in!Product DetailsPink non padded and non wired brassiere with lace cups Bow detail in red at the centreElasticated, adjustable shoulder strapsStretchable lace wings with three-eyed double hook closureMaterial and CareLace, blended fabricHand wash coldHang to dry Owing to the intimate nature of this product it is eligible for self-ship return only (no pick-up facility)
